---
title: "survivorship_glmm"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rgl)
library(naniar)
library(purrr)
library(gganimate)
library(nlme)
library(here)
library(MASS)
library(glmmTMB)
library(performance)
```

```{r}

coral <- read_csv(here::here("..", "eds-coral-data-storage-management", "data", "volume_corals.csv"))
```

```{r}
coral_colors <- c(
    Acr = "blue", 
    Poc = "red", 
    Por = "darkgreen", 
    Mil = "darkorange"
  )

coral_death <- coral %>% 
  group_by(coral_number) %>%
  arrange(year) %>% 
  filter(str_detect(transect, "T")) %>% 
  mutate(transect = case_when(
           str_detect(transect, "1") ~ "T1",
           str_detect(transect, "2") ~ "T2",
           str_detect(transect, "3") ~ "T3",
           str_detect(transect, "4") ~ "T4",
         ),
         taxa = case_when(
           str_detect(taxa, "A") ~ "Acr",
           TRUE ~ taxa
         )) %>% 
  mutate(current_volume = case_when(
    is.na(volume) ~ size_t_minus1,
    TRUE~ volume
  ),
  survival = case_when(
    dyn_death == 1 ~ 0,
    is.na(length) ~ NA,
    TRUE ~ 1
  ), 
  bleach = case_when(
    year < 2019 ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ 1
  ),
  transect_id = paste(site, habitat, transect, sep = "_")) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  filter(!is.na(survival)) %>% 
  mutate(height = case_when(
    height > 200 ~ height / 10, # Adjust 
    TRUE ~ height
  ))
```

# Site and habitat

## Pocillopera

```{r}
coral_poc <- coral_death %>% 
  filter(taxa == "Poc") %>% 
  mutate(vol_s = scale(current_volume),
         log_size = log(current_volume),
         bleach = factor(bleach)
         )

coral_surv_mod <- glmmTMB(survival ~ vol_s * site * habitat * bleach + (1 | transect_id/coral_number) + (1| year), family=binomial, data = coral_poc, na.action = na.exclude)

summary(coral_surv_mod)


coral_poc$fit.Surv <- predict(coral_surv_mod, type = "response", re.form = NA)

```

```{r}
ggplot(coral_poc, aes(current_volume, survival, color = bleach)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit.Surv, color = bleach)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "black")) +
  facet_grid(habitat~site, scales = "free") +
  theme_light()
```

## Acropera

```{r}
coral_acr <- coral_death %>% 
  filter(taxa == "Acr") %>% 
  mutate(vol_s = scale(current_volume),
         log_size = log(current_volume),
         bleach = factor(bleach)
         )

coral_surv_mod <- glmmTMB(survival ~ vol_s * site * habitat * bleach + (1 | transect_id/coral_number) + (1| year), family=binomial, data = coral_acr, na.action = na.exclude)

summary(coral_surv_mod)


coral_acr$fit.Surv <- predict(coral_surv_mod, type = "response", re.form = NA)

```

```{r}
ggplot(coral_acr, aes(current_volume, survival, color = bleach)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit.Surv, color = bleach)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "black")) +
  facet_grid(habitat~site, scales = "free") +
  theme_light()
```

## Porites

```{r}
coral_por <- coral_death %>% 
  filter(taxa == "Por") %>% 
  mutate(vol_s = scale(current_volume),
         log_size = log(current_volume),
         bleach = factor(bleach)
         )

coral_surv_mod <- glmmTMB(survival ~ vol_s * site * habitat * bleach + (1 | transect_id/coral_number) + (1| year), family=binomial, data = coral_por, na.action = na.exclude)

summary(coral_surv_mod)


coral_por$fit.Surv <- predict(coral_surv_mod, type = "response", re.form = NA)

```

```{r}
ggplot(coral_por, aes(current_volume, survival, color = bleach)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit.Surv, color = bleach)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "gray2")) +
  facet_grid(habitat~site, scales = "free") +
  theme_light()
```

# Habitat

## Pocillopera

```{r}
coral_poc_hab <- coral_death %>% 
  filter(taxa == "Poc") %>% 
  mutate(vol_s = scale(current_volume),
         log_size = log(current_volume),
         bleach = factor(bleach)
         )

coral_surv_mod <- glmmTMB(survival ~ vol_s * habitat * bleach + (1 | site/transect_id/coral_number) + (1| year), family=binomial, data = coral_poc_hab, na.action = na.exclude)

summary(coral_surv_mod)


coral_poc_hab$fit.Surv <- predict(coral_surv_mod, type = "response", re.form = NA)

```

```{r}
ggplot(coral_poc_hab, aes(current_volume, survival, color = bleach)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit.Surv, color = bleach)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "gray1")) +
  facet_grid(~habitat, scales = "free") +
  theme_light()
```

## Acropera

```{r}
coral_acr_hab <- coral_death %>% 
  filter(taxa == "Acr") %>% 
  mutate(vol_s = scale(current_volume),
         log_size = log(current_volume),
         bleach = factor(bleach)
         )

coral_surv_mod <- glmmTMB(survival ~ vol_s * habitat * bleach + (1 | site/transect_id/coral_number) + (1| year), family=binomial, data = coral_acr_hab, na.action = na.exclude)

summary(coral_surv_mod)


coral_acr_hab$fit.Surv <- predict(coral_surv_mod, type = "response", re.form = NA)

```

```{r}
ggplot(coral_acr_hab, aes(current_volume, survival, color = bleach)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit.Surv, color = bleach)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "black")) +
  facet_grid(bleach~habitat, scales = "free") +
  theme_light()
```

## Porites

```{r}
coral_por_hab <- coral_death %>% 
  filter(taxa == "Por") %>% 
  mutate(vol_s = scale(current_volume),
         log_size = log(current_volume),
         bleach = factor(bleach)
         )

coral_surv_mod <- glmmTMB(survival ~ vol_s * habitat * bleach + (1 | site/transect_id/coral_number) + (1| year), family=binomial, data = coral_por_hab, na.action = na.exclude)

summary(coral_surv_mod)


coral_por_hab$fit.Surv <- predict(coral_surv_mod, type = "response", re.form = NA)

```

```{r}
ggplot(coral_por_hab, aes(current_volume, survival, color = bleach)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit.Surv, color = bleach)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "black")) +
  facet_grid(bleach~habitat, scales = "free") +
  theme_light()
```
